params.name: Smoke Mirror
params.description: Made from volcanic obsidian, this Aztec relic reflects fate and night winds. Its frame, crafted from sacrificial ribs and gold, holds glyphs of lost sun ages. Priests used copal smoke and blood to divine visions—or suffer a deadly curse.
